headline: Oil-Service Companies Set to Reveal War’s Impact on Earnings
summary: (Bloomberg) -- This week will offer the clearest picture yet of the Iran war’s impact on the world’s biggest oil field service providers, with the likes of SLB Ltd., Baker Hughes Co. and Halliburton Co. all expected to take hits to their bottom line.Most Read from BloombergUS Strikes Iran in Escalating Campaign After Troops KilledThousands of Trucks Haul Iraq’s Oil Through Syria in Sign of Hormuz LegacyUS Strikes Iran to ‘Punish’ It for Attack That Killed 2 TroopsTrump Silent So Far on Iran Plan

headline: SLB Eyes 31% Profit Drop as Iran Conflict Tests Oilfield Services
summary: Halliburton, SLB and Baker Hughes earnings could reveal the full second-quarter impact of Middle East disruptions.
